Opportunities Offered at Our University Shared with Members of the Press

04.07.2022

A press meeting today, Monday, July 4th.

A press meeting was held at our University on Monday, July 4, with the participation of editors, directors and reporters of newspapers and television channels. Our President of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz, our Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan attended the press conference with breakfast, and the facilities offered at our University and Complex were introduced.

At the event, our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan made a presentation titled "Decisive Steps Towards the Future".

The event, where the questions of the members of the press were also answered; ended with a campus tour where the studio, Sports Center, student dormitories and faculties, education-teaching environments and social-cultural-sports opportunities were seen.
